signal_strength.label: High
signal_strength.summary: JobSignal found a clear resume structure and enough skill evidence to support a reliable analysis.

smart_analysis: Your resume may not closely match the wording and priorities of this job description yet.
Your resume shows relevant technical experience for this role.
This role appears to value communication. Consider adding experience with teamwork, presentations, documentation, or stakeholder collaboration.
Your resume may need stronger alignment with the role before applying.

fit_analysis.label: Moderate Role Alignment
fit_analysis.summary: Your background overlaps with parts of this role, but the resume still feels too broad or under-targeted for this specific position.
fit_analysis.next_action: Focus on tailoring your strongest experiences toward the responsibilities and skills emphasized in the posting.

action_plan.title: Improve Resume Wording Alignment
action_plan.why_it_matters: Your resume includes some relevant skills, but the wording does not closely match the job description. Applicant tracking systems and recruiters often look for language that clearly reflects the role's responsibilities.
action_plan.suggested_project: Rewrite 2 to 3 resume bullets using phrases from the job description while keeping the bullets honest and based on real experience.

resources.title: Harvard Resume and Cover Letter Guide

action_plan.title: Add Communication Evidence
action_plan.why_it_matters: This role emphasizes communication, collaboration, or stakeholder interaction. A technical resume can look incomplete if it only lists tools without showing how you explained results or worked with others.
action_plan.suggested_project: Add a bullet showing a time you explained data, documented a process, presented findings, worked with a team, or supported a non-technical audience.
